---
title: "Presentations"
format:
  html:
    meta:
      description: "Selected talks, slide decks, and interactive prototypes by Ben Brintz."
---

::: {=html}
<style>
html {
  background-color: #030a1c;
}

body {
  min-height: 100vh;
  background-color: #030a1c;
  background-image:
    radial-gradient(circle at 78% 70%, rgba(255, 120, 40, 0.24), transparent 42%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 22% 18%, rgba(102, 195, 255, 0.24), transparent 36%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 52% 112%, rgba(102, 195, 255, 0.14), transparent 44%),
    linear-gradient(145deg, #030a1c 0%, #071126 42%, #102047 74%, #061126 100%);
  background-attachment: fixed;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  color: #f8fbff;
}

h1.title {
  color: #f8fbff;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.presentation-intro {
  max-width: 740px;
  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
  color: #dbe6ff;
  font-size: 1.04rem;
  line-height: 1.65;
}

.presentation-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
  margin: 1.5rem 0 4.5rem;
}

.presentation-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  min-height: 210px;
  padding: 1rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(185, 206, 255, 0.2);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 18% 12%, rgba(126, 199, 255, 0.12), transparent 38%),
    rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.045);
  color: #f8fbff !important;
  text-decoration: none;
  box-shadow: 0 16px 34px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.24);
  transition: transform 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease, background-color 160ms ease;
}

.presentation-card:nth-child(2n) {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 80% 12%, rgba(255, 158, 68, 0.12), transparent 36%),
    rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.045);
}

.presentation-card:hover,
.presentation-card:focus-visible {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  border-color: rgba(255, 210, 122, 0.46);
  background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.07);
  outline: none;
}

.presentation-meta {
  color: #9ec1ec;
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.presentation-card h2 {
  margin: 0;
  color: #ffffff;
  font-size: 1.45rem;
  line-height: 1.16;
}

.presentation-card p {
  margin: 0;
  color: #dbe6ff;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

.presentation-action {
  align-self: end;
  color: #ffd27a;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.presentation-feature {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(220px, 0.45fr);
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.presentation-copy {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.7rem;
}

.presentation-related {
  display: grid;
  align-content: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  border-left: 1px solid rgba(219, 230, 255, 0.22);
  padding-left: 1rem;
}

.related-kicker {
  color: #9ec1ec;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.related-link {
  display: block;
  color: #ffd27a !important;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.related-link:hover,
.related-link:focus-visible {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  .presentation-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .presentation-card h2 {
    font-size: 1.2rem;
  }

  .presentation-feature {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .presentation-related {
    border-left: 0;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(219, 230, 255, 0.22);
    padding-left: 0;
    padding-top: 0.75rem;
  }
}
</style>
:::

::: {.presentation-intro}
Talks and prototypes, collected as a small portfolio rather than a link list. The common thread is making statistical models inspectable enough to argue with.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="presentation-grid">
  <article class="presentation-card presentation-feature">
    <div class="presentation-copy">
      <span class="presentation-meta">211 surveillance modeling</span>
      <h2>Anomaly Detection Model Overview</h2>
      <p>A slide deck explaining the food-needs 211 model, including zero inflation, rate jumps, day-of-week effects, seasonality, and AR(1) dependence.</p>
      <a class="presentation-action" href="211_pres/v5_model_presentation.html">Open slides</a>
    </div>
    <div class="presentation-related">
      <span class="related-kicker">Related prototype</span>
      <a class="related-link" href="surveillance_dashboard.html">Utah Food-Needs ZIP Map</a>
      <p>A focused map view for reviewing ZIP-level model signals by run date.</p>
    </div>
  </article>
  <a class="presentation-card" href="mmdis/">
    <span class="presentation-meta">Fairness and decision tools</span>
    <h2>Measuring and Mitigating Disparity of Decision-Making Tools</h2>
    <p>A presentation on evaluating prediction systems when accuracy is not the only thing that matters.</p>
    <span class="presentation-action">Open slides</span>
  </a>
  <a class="presentation-card" href="seir-n-mixture/">
    <span class="presentation-meta">Disease surveillance</span>
    <h2>SEIR N-mixture Model</h2>
    <p>A modeling talk about epidemic dynamics, observation error, and what surveillance data can and cannot tell us.</p>
    <span class="presentation-action">Open slides</span>
  </a>
  <a class="presentation-card" href="VA-IDEAS/">
    <span class="presentation-meta">Applied modeling</span>
    <h2>Complex Bayesian Models</h2>
    <p>Slides for an applied modeling workflow built around simulation, uncertainty, and public-health signal detection.</p>
    <span class="presentation-action">Open slides</span>
  </a>
</div>
```
